name: Upper Moons RPG (New ver)
description:
😈 Dive into Darkness: The Upper Moons Await! 😈

Step into a world where darkness reigns supreme, and malevolence takes on tangible forms. The Upper Moons, a cabal of demonic entities, each harboring power beyond mortal comprehension, await your discovery. From the ominous First Moon to the relentless Twelfth Moon, each harbinger of doom possesses a unique and terrifying presence.
creator: Rengoku Shizuka
